REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CHRISTINE MUHAWIEH, ISA MUHAWIEH'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE RENT ORDINANCE AND UCL VIOLATION BASED ON THE VIOLATION OF THE RENT ORDINANCE. THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT THE LANDLORDS IMPROPERLY RECOVERED POSSESSION AND RE-RENTED THE UNIT TO A THIRD PARTY BEFORE THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE SFRO AMENDMENT. PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT UNDER THESE FACTS PLAINTIFF STILL HAS A VIABLE TENANCY. IN FACT, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT THEIR TENANCY HAS BEEN IMPROPERLY TERMINATED AND POSSESSORY RIGHTS GIVEN TO THIRD PARTIES IN 2019. AGUIRRE V. LEE (1993) 20 CAL. APP. 4TH1646 IS FACTUALLY DISTINGUISHABLE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(501/REQ)
